name: NIB_DIALOG
description: Custom Interface Builder (.nib) dialog. NIB_NAME (no extension) resolves to <name>.nib anywhere under Contents/Resources, including a localized .lproj (Base.lproj / English.lproj / en.lproj) — Cocoa finds it via the bundle's localization search (Layer 2). Subcommand-ID keys reference COMMAND_IDs (Layer 2).

NIB_NAME.description: Nib resource name without extension; case-sensitive.
